description_long: This is a modern, two-story house enclosed by a wooden fence, featuring a minimalist cubic design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior is finished in a smooth gray material, and the house has large, rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, allowing for ample natural light. The front yard includes a paved walkway, a small garden area, and an outdoor dining set, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The backyard is partially paved and contains additional garden plots, while the side yard features a utility structure, possibly for storage or HVAC equipment. The house's main entrance is set back under a covered area, providing shelter and a sense of privacy. Overall, the design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, two-story gray house with large windows, flat roofs, and a wooden fence, featuring outdoor dining and garden areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with large windows, outdoor dining set, garden plots, and the main entryway under a covered area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, flat roof, utility structure, and garden plots along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with more windows, paved areas, and the utility structure adjacent to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the outdoor dining set, the side of the house, and the full extent of the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry under a covered area, no visible steps, minimalistic with no decorative columns or overhangs
